document1: Z_Brand Z_Model is a 5-inch electric random orbital sander designed for smooth, swirl-free finishing on wood, paint, and filler. Its 2.8-amp motor and variable speed dial let users adjust from 7,000 to 12,000 OPM for light finishing or faster stock removal. The compact body, rubberized grip, and low-vibration design make it comfortable during longer projects. It also includes a hook-and-loop sanding pad, dust bag, and vacuum adapter for cleaner work.
document2: For DIYers and home workshop users, the Z_Brand Z_Model electric sander offers a strong balance of control and performance. This corded 5-inch random orbital model uses a 2.8-amp motor and variable speed range of 7,000-12,000 OPM, helping it handle furniture refinishing, edge smoothing, and paint prep. A dust-sealed switch supports durability, while the ergonomic grip reduces hand fatigue. The package includes a hook-and-loop pad, removable dust bag, and vacuum connection option.
document3: The Z_Brand Z_Model electric sander is built for versatile sanding jobs, from final finishing to moderate material removal. Its 5-inch random orbital action helps reduce visible sanding marks, while the 2.8-amp motor delivers consistent power. Users can fine-tune performance with a variable speed control spanning 7,000 to 12,000 OPM. The tool features a balanced, low-vibration body, rubber overmold grip, and easy hook-and-loop paper changes. Dust collection is supported through the included bag or a vacuum adapter.
document4: Z_Brand Z_Model is a practical electric sander for homeowners, makers, and general woodworking tasks. The 5-inch random orbital design is ideal for smoothing tabletops, cabinet panels, and patched surfaces without leaving heavy swirl patterns. A 2.8-amp corded motor provides dependable power, and the variable speed dial adjusts between 7,000 and 12,000 OPM. Comfort-focused details include a compact shape, ergonomic rubber grip, and reduced vibration. It comes with a hook-and-loop pad, dust bag, and vacuum adapter for cleaner sanding.
